scripts.build: cd packages/tui && bun run build && cd ../ai && bun run build && cd ../agent && bun run build && cd ../coding-agent && bun run build
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings . && bun run check:pinned-deps && bun run check:ts-imports && bun run check:shrinkwrap && tsgo --noEmit && bun run check:browser-smoke
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && bun install && npm install --package-lock-only
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && bun install && npm install --package-lock-only
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && bun install && npm install --package-lock-only
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun run check
scripts.publish: bun run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: bun run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
